description_long: This is a single-story brick house with a flat roof and a compact, rectangular footprint. The front features a small fenced garden area, a paved driveway, and a pink car parked in front. The house has large windows, including a prominent bay window facing the street, and a white front door with a small stoop. The exterior walls are primarily red brick, with white trim around the windows and doors. The backyard is enclosed by a white picket fence and contains a patio area with outdoor furniture. The overall design is simple and functional, with a suburban residential feel.
description: A single-story red brick house with a flat roof, bay window, fenced garden, and driveway with a parked car.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, pink car, main entry with white door, bay window, and fenced garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced patio area, bay window, and the length of the brick wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back brick wall, windows, and a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard patio, side windows, and the driveway leading to the street.
attribute_entryway_design: White front door with small stoop, bay window, and fenced garden area
